name: Mexican Corn Scramble
recipeIngredient: 1 can (11 ounces) whole kernel corn with peppers, drained
1 can (2-1/4 ounces) sliced ripe olives, drained
1 cup cubed fully cooked smoked ham or sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium skillet, sauté onion in butter until tender.
2. Stir in corn and olives.
3. Add eggs; cook and stir over medium heat until eggs just begin to set.
4. Add ham or sausage and cheese.
5. Cook until eggs are fully cooked and cheese is melted.
6. Serve with tortilla chips and picante sauce.
